whyItMatters: Feejignaanta wadajirka ah waa mid ka mid ah dhismayaasha ugu horreeya ee isgaarsiinta. Marka ilmuhu barto inuu diirada la wadaago daryeelaha isla shay ama dhacdo, waxay furaysaa albaabka horumarka luqadda, barashada bulshada, iyo xidhiidhka shucuureed. Cilmi-baaristu waxay muujinaysaa in hagaajinta dareenka wadajirka ah ay horseeddo guulo laga gaaro luqadda lagu hadlo bilo gudahood.
steps: U fiirso waxa ilmahaagu si dabiici ah u xiisaynayo adoon dib u jeedin dareenkooda.
U dhig naftaada heerka indhahooda iyo xariiqa aragooda.
Ka sheekee waxa ay sameynayaan adiga oo isticmaalaya weedho gaagaaban oo cad sida 'Waxaad heshay kubbadda!'
Haki ilaa 5 ilbidhiqsi oo sug jawaab kasta - muuqaal, dhawaaq, ama tilmaantu waxay tixgalinaysaa guul.
sources: Autism Speaks — Early Start Denver Model: Joint Attention (autismspeaks.org/early-start-denver-model-esdm)
Chicago ABA Therapy — Joint Attention Routines in ESDM (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/joint-attention-routines-and-how-they-are-implemented-in-esdm/)
ASHA — Joint Attention and Language Development (asha.org)

whyItMatters: Carruurta aan hadal ahayn ama hadalkoodu xaddidan yahay, hababka is-weydaarsiga sawirku waxay siinayaan hab la taaban karo oo ay ku muujiyaan rabitaan iyo baahiyo. Tani waxay yaraynaysaa dabeecadaha ku salaysan niyad-jabka waxayna dhistaa aasaaska isgaadhsiinta kakan. Carruur badan oo ku bilaaba isweydaarsiga sawirka ayaa ugu dambeyntii horumariya luqadda lagu hadlo sidoo kale.
steps: Dooro 3-5 sawir oo ah alaabta ama hawlaha uu ilmahaagu aadka u doorbido.
Dhig sawirada halka ilmahaagu si fudud uga heli karo inta lagu jiro hawl maalmeedka.
Marka ilmahaagu gaadho shay, si tartiib ah u hagi inay marka hore sawirka ku siiyaan.
Isla markiiba sii shayga la codsaday oo si cad u sheeg magaciisa - 'Casiirka! Waxaad waydiisatay casiir!'
sources: PECS USA — Picture Exchange Communication System (pecsusa.com/pecs/)
Indiana University IRCA — What is PECS? (iidc.indiana.edu/irca/articles/what-is-the-picture-exchange-communication-system-or-pecs.html)
Autism Speaks — Augmentative and Alternative Communication (autismspeaks.org/augmentative-and-alternative-communication)

skill: Ku-ballaadhinta kelmadaha kelliga ah ee jumladaha
whyItMatters: Marka ilmuhu isticmaalo kelmado keli ah, tillaabada koritaaneed ee xigta waa in kelmado la isu geeyo weedho laba eray ah. Xirfadani waxay si aad ah u kordhisaa awooda ay ku gudbin karaan baahiyo gaar ah waxayna yaraynaysaa malo awaalka daryeel bixiyayaasha. Furaha ayaa si dabiici ah uga sii fidaya waxa uu ilmuhu mar hore sheegay, halkii uu soo bandhigi lahaa eray bixin cusub oo dhammaystiran.
steps: Dhegayso ereyada uu ilmahaagu si iskiis ah u isticmaalo maalintii oo dhan.
Marka ay yidhaahdaan hal kelmad sida 'kubad', ku dar hal kelmad si aad u qaabayso weedha: 'Kubad Weyn' ama 'Roll ball'.
Sug si filo leh ka dib qaabaynta - sii 5-10 ilbiriqsi si ay isugu dayaan jumlada.
U aqbal qiyaas kasta si xamaasad leh oo ku celi weedha buuxda si dabiici ah.
sources: Raising Children Network — Language Development in Autistic Children (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/development/language-development)
ASHA — Late Language Emergence (asha.org/practice-portal/clinical-topics/late-language-emergence/)

whyItMatters: Barashada Deegaanka Dabiiciga ah (NET) waxay gelisaa isgaadhsiinta hawl maalmeedka dhabta ah, taasoo ka dhigaysa barashada mid macno badan oo dhiirigelin leh. Marka carruurtu bartaan inay codsadaan inta lagu jiro waxqabadyada ay hore ugu raaxaysanayeen - cunto fudud, alaabta ay ku ciyaaraan, bannaanbaxyada - xirfadda isgaarsiineed si dhakhso ah ayey u guudeysaa goobaha kale. Habkani wuxuu ku salaysan yahay mabaadi'da ABA laakiin wuxuu dareemaa dabiici iyo ciyaar.
steps: Inta lagu jiro wakhtiga cunto fudud, hay laba doorasho oo sug in ilmahaagu muujiyo doorasho - dhibic, kelmad, ama calaamad.
Beerta lagu nasto, hakado lulaynta oo sug ilaa ilmahaagu codsado ' riixitaan' ama 'ka badan' ka hor intaadan dib u bilaabin.
Inta lagu jiro ciyaarta, qabso toy aad door bidayso meel aan la gaadhin oo ku daydo codsiga: 'Tareen ma rabtaa?' ka dibna sug.
Had iyo jeer ixtiraam codsiga isla markiiba - shayga laftiisa waa xoojinta dabiiciga ah.
sources: Magnet ABA — Natural Environment Teaching (magnetaba.com/blog/aba-therapy-and-natural-environment-teaching)
Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
Behavioral Innovations — ABA Strategies at Home (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/implement-aba-therapy-strategies-at-home/)

whyItMatters: Carruur badan oo autism ah ayaa la halgamaya kala-guurka u dhexeeya waxqabadyada. Guddi marka hore ka dib waxay bixisaa qaab muuqaal ah oo ka dhigaya isku xigxiga la saadaalin karo: 'Marka hore waxaan sameynaa tan, ka dibna waxaan sameyneynaa taas.' Tani waxay yaraynaysaa welwelka, waxay yaraynaysaa caabbinta, waxayna dhistaa fahamka isku xigxiga ee taageera horumarinta luqadda.
steps: Samee loox fudud oo leh laba barood oo lagu calaamadeeyay 'Ugu horreyn' iyo 'kadib' adiga oo isticmaalaya sawirro ama sawirro.
Dhig hawsha aan la door bidinin meesha 'Kowad' iyo waxqabad dhiirigelinaya goobta 'Markaa'.
Tilmaan sawir kasta oo ka sheekee: 'Kabaha ugu horreeya, ka dibna garoonka ciyaarta'.
Si joogto ah ula soco - had iyo jeer bixi hawsha 'ka dibna' si aad u dhisto kalsoonida nidaamka.
sources: Autism Classroom Resources — Visual Schedule Series: First-Then (autismclassroomresources.com/visual-schedule-series-first-then/)
Raising Children Network — Visual Supports (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/visual-supports)
TEACCH — Structured Teaching and Visual Supports (teacch.com)

whyItMatters: Kahor intaanay erayada lagu hadlin horumarinin, dhaqdhaqaaqyadu waa buundada muhiimka ah ee isgaarsiinta. Tilmaamidda, gacan-ku-haynta, ruxitaanka, iyo ruxitaanka madaxa dhammaan waa ficillo isgaarsiineed oo macno leh. Dhisidda isgaadhsiinta uurka waxay yaraynaysaa niyad-jabka waxayna abuurtaa fursado badan oo isdhexgalka bulshada, taas oo iyana taageerta horumarinta luqadda lagu hadlo.
steps: Dhaqdhaqaaqyada moodeelka si joogto ah - rux mar kasta oo aad salaan tiraahdo, tilmaan marka aad magacawday walxaha.
Samee xaalado dhaqdhaqaaqyo looga baahan yahay: laba shay kor u qaad si ilmahaagu u tilmaamo inuu doorto.
Si degdeg ah oo xamaasad leh uga jawaab tilmaan kasta oo ilmahaagu sameeyo, xataa kuwa shilalka ah.
Ku lammaan tilmaan kasta kelmed fudud si ilmahaagu u maqlo luqadda oo barbar socota ficilka.
sources: Avela Health — Basic Sign Language for Autism (joinavela.com/resources/basic-sign-language-for-autism/)
CDC — Learn the Signs. Act Early: Communication Milestones (cdc.gov/act-early/)
ASHA — Communication Development in Children with Autism (asha.org)

whyItMatters: Qaar badan oo ka mid ah barnaamijyada isgaarsiinta hore ayaa diiradda saaraya oo kaliya codsashada (wax waydiinta). Laakin ka faallooda - tilmaamida wax xiiso leh, calaamadinta waxaad aragto, wadaaga khibrad - waa aasaaska wada hadalka. Barista faallooyinka iyada oo ay weheliso codsigu waxay dhistaa xidhiidhiye dheellitiran oo isku xidhi kara bulsho ahaan, maaha kaliya in baahiyaha la daboolo.
steps: Inta lagu jiro socodka ama ciyaarta, moodeelka faallooyinka had iyo jeer: ' Eeg, eey!' ama 'Wow, baabuur weyn!'
Tilmaan waxyaabaha xiisaha leh oo hakad, siinta ilmahaaga fursad uu ku eego oo uu uga falceliyo.
Marka ilmahaagu u eego shay xiiso leh, ku calaamadee iyaga: 'Waxaad arkaysaa shimbirta!'
U dabbaaldeg faallooyinka inta la codsado - haddii ilmahaagu tilmaamo diyaarad, ku jawaab farxad.
sources: Blue ABA Therapy — Tacting in ABA (blueabatherapy.com/aba/tacting/)
Childwise ABA — Manding vs Tacting (childwiseaba.com/tacting-and-manding/)
DIR/Floortime — Circles of Communication (icdl.com/dir)

whyItMatters: Doorasho samayntu waa xirfad isgaarsiineed oo xoog badan oo siisa carruurta inay maamulaan deegaankooda. Carruur badan oo autistic ah, doorashooyinka afku waxay u noqon karaan kuwo xad dhaaf ah, laakiin taageerooyinka muuqaalku waxay ka dhigaan doorashooyin la taaban karo oo cad. Ku celcelinta joogtada ah ee xulashooyinka waxay dhistaa xirfadaha isgaarsiinta iyo dareenka madaxbannaanida taas oo yaraynaysa dabeecadaha adag.
steps: Ku bilow laba ikhtiyaar oo muuqaal ah oo cad - walxo dhab ah, sawirro, ama calaamado sawir.
Soo bandhig doorashooyin waqtiyada dhiirigelinta dabiiciga ah: 'Ma rabtaa buskud ama tufaax?'
Aqbal nooc kasta oo aad doorato: gaarista, tilmaanta, eegitaanka, ama hadalka ereyga.
Si tartiib tartiib ah u kordhi fursadaha 2 ilaa 3-4 marka ilmahaagu uu kalsooni ku yeesho doorashada.
sources: Chicago ABA Therapy — Pivotal Response Training: Choice-Making (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/dtt-difference-prt/)
Raising Children Network — Visual Supports (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/visual-supports)

skill: Luuqadda Soo Dhawaynta: Tilmaamaha soo socda
whyItMatters: Luuqadda soo dhawaynta - fahamka waxay dadka kale yidhaahdaan - waxay caadi ahaan horumartaa ka hor luqadda muujinta. Xoojinta luqadda soo dhaweynta iyada oo loo marayo waxqabadyo madadaalo leh oo raacaya jihada waxay dhistaa saldhigga fahamka ee taageera hadalka mustaqbalka. Carruurta raaci karta tilmaamaha fudud waxay sidoo kale si guul leh uga qaybqaataan dugsiga iyo goobaha daawaynta.
steps: Ku bilow tilmaamo hal-tallaabo ah inta lagu guda jiro dhaqdhaqaaqyada dhiirigelinta: 'Kubada rogrogo' ama 'Fur santuuqa.'
Isticmaal tilmaanta dhinaca tilmaamaha afka marka hore, ka dibna si tartiib ah u libdhi dhaqdhaqaaqyada.
Ciyaar ka dhig: ku ciyaar 'Simon Says' dhaqdhaqaaqyo jidheed oo fudud oo ilmahaagu ka helo.
U gudub jihooyin laba-tallaabo ah marka hal-tallaabo ay joogto: 'Koobka qaado oo ii keen.'
sources: Blue ABA Therapy — Discrete Trial Training (blueabatherapy.com/aba/discrete-trial-training-aba/)
ASHA — Receptive Language Disorders (asha.org/practice-portal/clinical-topics/spoken-language-disorders/)
Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)

whyItMatters: Akhrinta buugaagta is dhex galka ah waa mid ka mid ah hawlaha ugu waxtarka badan ee luqadda lagu dhisayo carruurta yaryar. Carruurta autistic-ka ah, buugaagtu waxay siiyan la saadaalin karo, waayo-aragnimada luqadeed ee lagu celin karo oo leh taageero muuqaal ah. Akhriska la wadaago waxa ay dhistaa erayada, fahamka, dareenka wadajirka ah, iyo laxanka qaadashada ee hoosta ka xariiqaya wada hadalka.
steps: Dooro buugaag leh qoraal fudud, soo noqnoqonaya iyo sawirro cad oo ku habboon danaha ilmahaaga.
U ogolow ilmahaagu inuu maamulo buugga - u rogida bogag, tilmaamida sawirada, dib ugu noqoshada boggaga uu jecel yahay.
Ku hakado qaybaha la saadaalin karo oo sug inta ilmahaagu buuxinayo: 'Brown bear, ors brown, what do you...'
Weydii su'aalo fudud oo ku saabsan sawirada: 'Aaway bisadu?' oo aqbal tilmaanta sida jawaab sax ah.
sources: Reading Rockets — Structured Teaching Strategies for Autism (readingrockets.org/topics/autism-spectrum-disorder/articles/structured-teaching-strategies-students-autism-spectrum)
Raising Children Network — Reading with Autistic Children (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/school-play-work/play-learning/reading)
AAP — Literacy Promotion (aap.org)

whyItMatters: Carruur badan oo autism-ka qaba ayaa soo mara marxalad cayaareed oo barbar socota oo ay ka garab ciyaaraan facooda halkii ay toos ula ciyaari lahaayeen. Tani waa marxalad horumarineed oo ansax ah oo muhiim ah. Markaad ka sheekaynayso ciyaarta barbar socota, waxaad ka caawinaysaa ilmahaaga inuu ogaado kuwa kale oo uu dhiso buundada ciyaarta is dhex galka ah adoon ku qasbin baahida bulshada ee walaaca keenta.
steps: Ku fadhiiso meel u dhow ilmahaaga adigoo wadata toy ama hawl la mid ah - ha isku dayin inaad si toos ah ugu biirto ciyaartooda.
Ka sheekee ficiladaada: 'Waxaan dhisayaa munaarad dheer' adigoo marmarka qaarkood ka sheekeynaya tooda: 'Waxaad safaf gelinaysaa baabuurta'.
Haddii ilmahaagu jaleeco hawshaada, si diiran ugu qir: 'Waxaad aragtay munaaraddayda!'
Si tartiib tartiib ah u samee daqiiqado is-kordhin ah - ku rog baabuurka meel u dhow xariiqdooda, bixi meel ka mid ah tuulankaaga.
sources: Raising Children Network — Play and Autistic Children (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/school-play-work/play-learning)
Forta Health — Interactive Play for Children with Autism (fortahealth.com/resources/interactive-play-for-children-with-autism)
DIR/Floortime — Engaging and Relating (icdl.com/dir)

whyItMatters: Soo-jeedin-qaadashadu waa xirfad bulsho oo aasaasi ah oo hoosta ka xariiqaysa wada-hadalka, cayaarta iskaashiga, iyo ka-qaybgalka fasalka. Laga bilaabo dhaqdhaqaaqyada dhiirigelinta sare leh waxay fikradda ka dhigtaa mid la taaban karo oo faa'iido leh. Carruurta si fiican u fahma ka-qaadashada goobaha ciyaarta waxay xirfaddan u beddelaan is-dhexgal bulsho oo kakan muddo ka dib.
steps: Dooro waxqabad uu ilmahaagu jecel yahay oo si dabiici ah ku lug leh leexashada - kubbadda la rog-rogid, dhejisyo, ama ciyaar kaniini fudud.
Si cad u dheh 'Wakaalladayda' iyo 'Wakaalladaada' adiga oo isticmaalaya calaamad muuqaal ah sida tilmaanta ama kaarka-rogista.
Marka hore ka dhig bariddaada gaaban (3-5 ilbiriqsi) si muddada sugitaanka loo maareeyo.
Si tartiib tartiib ah u kordhi dhererka leexashada marka ilmahaagu uu dhisayo dulqaadka sugidda.
sources: Chicago ABA Therapy — PRT: Turn-Taking Games (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/dtt-difference-prt/)
Autism Speaks — Social Skills and Autism (autismspeaks.org/social-skills-and-autism)
Raising Children Network — Role Play and Social Skills (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/children-autism-videos/social-skills-autistic-children-role-play)

whyItMatters: Fahamka shucuurta dadka kale waxay inta badan ku adag tahay carruurta autistic-ka, ma aha sababtoo ah waxay ka maqan yihiin naxariis laakiin sababtoo ah akhrinta tibaaxaha wejiga way adkaan kartaa. Isticmaalka sawirada dhabta ah ee dadka yaqaana ee la kulma shucuurtu waxay siinaysaa tusaalooyin la taaban karo oo la taaban karo. Xirfadani waxay taageertaa isku xirnaanta bulsheed ee qoto dheer waxayna ka caawisaa carruurta inay si habboon uga jawaabaan xaaladaha bulshada.
steps: Soo ururi sawirada xubnaha qoyska oo muujinaya shucuur cad - dhoola cadeyn weyn, waji yaab leh, waqtiyo murugo leh.
Ku bilow laba dareen oo is burinaya (farxad vs murugo) oo magac iyaga oo wada eegaya sawirada.
Weydii cunugaada inuu ku habboonaado dareenka: 'Wejigee ku faraxsan yahay?' - aqbal tilmaanta ama tilmaam kasta.
Ku xidh shucuurta nolol maalmeedka: 'Fiiri, walaashaa way dhoola cadeynaysaa - way ku faraxsan tahay sababtoo ah waad wadaagtay!'
sources: Autism Parenting Magazine — 25 Emotional Regulation Techniques (autismparentingmagazine.com/help-child-with-emotional-regulation/)
How to ABA — Emotional Regulation in Autism (howtoaba.com/emotional-regulation-in-autism/)
Autism Speaks — Emotion Recognition (autismspeaks.org/social-skills-and-autism)

whyItMatters: Sheekooyinka bulshada, oo ay soo saartay Carol Gray, waxay isticmaashaa sheekoyin fudud si ay ugu sharaxdo xaaladaha bulsheed marka laga eego aragtida ilmaha. Waxay yareeyaan welwelka ku saabsan xaaladaha aan la aqoon iyagoo ka dhigaya filashooyinka cad oo la saadaalin karo. Cilmi-baaristu waxay muujinaysaa sheekooyinka bulsheed inay hagaajiyaan hab-dhaqanka bulshada waxayna yareeyaan dabeecadaha adag ee meelo badan.
steps: Aqoonso xaalad bulsheed oo soo socota oo ilmahaagu ay ku adag tahay - booqasho dhakhtar, xaflad dhalasho, ama fasal cusub.
Qor sheeko gaaban (5-8 jumladood) oo aad ku sifayso waxa dhici doona, adigoo isticmaalaya luqadda 'I will': 'Waxaan aadi doonaa dhakhtarka. Dhakhtarku wuxuu maqli doonaa qalbigayga.
Ku dar hadal niyad-jab leh: 'Tani waa caadi. Hooyo/Aabe ayaa ila joogi doona waqtiga oo dhan.'
La akhri sheekada ilmahaaga 2-3 jeer ka hor dhacdada, iyo hal mar oo kale isla markaaba ka hor intaadan tegin.
sources: Carol Gray Social Stories — Official Site (carolgraysocialstories.com)
Life Skills Advocate — How to Write a Social Story (lifeskillsadvocate.com/blog/how-to-write-a-social-story/)
Autism Little Learners — Free Social Stories for Home (autismlittlelearners.com/social-stories-for-home/)

whyItMatters: Salaan iyo sagootin ayaa ka mid ah isdhexgalka bulsho ee ugu badan ee nolol maalmeedka. Carruurta autism-ka qabta, kuwani waxay dareemi karaan jahawareer ama culays la'aan waxbarasho cad. Abuuritaanka salaanta joogtada ah, ee raaxada leh waxay siinaysaa ilmahaaga hab la isku halayn karo oo uu kaga qayb qaadan karo iswaydaarsiga bulshada waxayna dhistaa kalsoonida isdhexgalka kale.
steps: Dooro hal qaab oo salaan ah oo ilmahaagu ku raaxaysanayo - hir, shan sare, feero garaac, ama odhanaya 'hi'.
Ku celceli guriga marka hore: ku daydo salaanta markaad qol gasho oo ku dhiirigeli ilmahaaga inuu ka jawaabo.
Isticmaal salaanta isku mid ah si joogto ah xubnaha qoyska ilaa ay noqoto mid toos ah.
Si tartiib tartiib ah ugu fidi dadka la yaqaan ee ka baxsan guriga - macalimiinta, deriska, qaraabada.
sources: STAR Autism Support — Social Scripts That Work (starautismsupport.com/simple-social-scripts-work)
Raising Children Network — Role Play and Social Skills (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/children-autism-videos/social-skills-autistic-children-role-play)

whyItMatters: Ciyaarta iskaashiga - ka wada shaqaynta yoolka la wadaago - waa xirfad bulsheed oo aad u horumarsan oo ku dhisan ciyaarta barbar socota iyo jeedinta. Waxay u baahan tahay isgaarsiin, fiiro gaar ah la wadaago, iyo tanaasul. Laga bilaabo qaabaysan, waxqabadyo muuqaal ah sida dhismo dhismo leh ama dhamaystirka halxiraalaha ayaa ka dhigaya fikradda 'wada shaqaynta' mid la taaban karo.
steps: Dooro hawl leh yool cad oo la wadaago: wada dhis munaarad, dhammaystir halxiraalaha, ama sawir samee.
U qoondee doorar cad: 'Adiga ayaa soo xushay gabalka, waan gelin doonaa' ama 'Waxaad dhejisaa, waxaan ku wareejin doonaa baloogyada.'
Isticmaal taageerooyinka muuqaalka haddii loo baahdo - sawirka alaabta la dhammeeyey si ay labada ciyaaryahan u ogaadaan yoolka.
U dabaaldeg guusha la wadaago: 'Taas si wadajir ah ayaan u dhisnay! Wadashaqeyn fiican!'
sources: Forta Health — Interactive Play for Children with Autism (fortahealth.com/resources/interactive-play-for-children-with-autism)
Autism Speaks — Social Skills and Autism (autismspeaks.org/social-skills-and-autism)
Indiana Resource Center for Autism — Making and Keeping Friends (iidc.indiana.edu/irca/articles/making-and-keeping-friends.html)

whyItMatters: Carruur badan oo autism-ka qaba ayaa dhib ku ah inay qiimeeyaan masaafada jireed ee habboon ee isdhexgalka bulshada. Tani waxay u horseedi kartaa istaagid aad u dhow ama aad u fog, taas oo saameynaysa sida asxaabtu uga jawaabaan iyaga. Baritaanka goobta gaarka ah si cad oo la taaban karo, hababka muuqaalku waxay ka caawiyaan carruurta inay u maraan u dhawaanshaha bulshada si ay u dareemaan ammaan qof kasta.
steps: Isticmaal hula hoop ama ku dheji goobabada dhulka si aad u tusto 'booskayga' - ilmahaagu ha istaago gudaha.
Layliska qoyska: 'Markaan hadlayno, waxaan istaagnaa qiyaastii hal cudud oo dherer ah' waana wada cabbirnaa.
Xaaladaha door-ciyaar: u dhawaansho, ka dib la qabso masaafada raaxada leh, adigoo ka sheekaynaya faraqa u dhexeeya.
U isticmaal calaamad muuqaal ah sida cudud fidsan sidi 'goob jeegare' ilmahaagu u isticmaali karo si madaxbannaan.
sources: Autism Speaks — Social Skills and Autism (autismspeaks.org/social-skills-and-autism)
Indiana Resource Center for Autism — Social Skills (iidc.indiana.edu/irca/articles/making-and-keeping-friends.html)

whyItMatters: Wadaaggu way ku adag tahay carruur badan oo yaryar, laakiin carruurta autism-ka ah ayaa laga yaabaa inay si gaar ah ugu adkaato xiisaha aadka u daran ee alaabta gaarka ah. Halkii lagu qasbi lahaa wadaaga, baridda nidaamka sugitaanka habaysan oo leh waqti-xireyaal iyo tilmaamo muuqaal ah waxay dhistaa xirfadda si tartiib tartiib ah iyadoo la ixtiraamayo ku-xidhnaanta ubadka alaabtooda.
steps: Ku bilow walxaha aan la door bidin - wadaaga toyga aad ugu jeceshahay waa mid aad u adag marka hore.
Isticmaal saacad muqaal: 'Waxaad ciyaareysaa 2 daqiiqo, ka dib waa walaashaa 2 daqiiqo.'
Ka sheekee habka: 'Si fiican baad u sugaysaa! Ku dhawaad ​​​​mar kale.'
Ammaan hab dhaqanka wadaagga gaarka ah: 'Waxaad siisay Alex midabka buluuga ah - taasi waxay ahayd naxariis!'
sources: Raising Children Network — Sharing and Autistic Children (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/behaviour/common-concerns/sharing)
Chicago ABA Therapy — PRT: Turn-Taking (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/dtt-difference-prt/)
ABA Journey — Token Economy for Autism (abajourney.com/token-economy-autism/)

whyItMatters: Culayska dareemaha ayaa ah mid ka mid ah waxyaabaha ugu badan ee kiciya hoos u dhaca carruurta autism-ka. Haysashada xirmo gaar ah oo dejintu waxay baraysaa is-xakamaynta waxayna siisaa ilmahaaga qalab la taaban karo si uu u maareeyo waqtiyada adag. Muddo ka dib, carruurtu waxay bartaan inay gartaan baahiyahooda dareenka oo ay si madaxbannaan u raadiyaan xeelado dejin.
steps: U fiirso waxa dareenka dareenku dejiyo ilmahaaga - cadaadis qoto dheer, texture jilicsan, dhaqdhaqaaqa laxanka, ama meelaha deggan.
Ku soo ururi 5-6 shay oo ku jira bac yar ama sanduuq: taleefoonnada dhegaha ee buuqa baabi'iya, kubbadda walbahaarka, maro jilicsan, silsilad calalsan, weel dhalaalaysa.
Soo bandhig xirmada inta lagu jiro daqiiqad degan - u ogolow ilmahaagu inuu sahamiyo shay kasta cadaadis la'aan.
Marka aad aragto calaamadaha hore ee culeyska, sii xirmada iyo moodelka adiga oo isticmaalaya shay: 'Aan isku tuujinno kubbadda.'
sources: Advanced Autism Services — Creating a Calm-Down Corner (advancedautism.com/post/creating-a-calm-down-corner-for-autism)
STAR Institute — Sensory Activities at Home (sensoryhealth.org/basic/home-activities)
Autism Research Institute — Sensory-Friendly Strategies at Home (autism.org/sensory-friendly-strategies-at-home-p2/)

whyItMatters: Carruur badan oo autism ah ayaa ah dareen-doonayaal u baahan dhaqdhaqaaq joogto ah si loo ilaaliyo nidaamka maalinta oo dhan. Dhaqdhaqaaqa la qorsheeyey wuxuu ka hortagaa kororka baahida dareenka taasoo u horseedi karta dabeecad degdeg ah ama dhalaalid. Daaweeye xirfadeed ayaa kaa caawin kara habaynta cuntada dareenka, laakiin nasashada dhaqdhaqaaqa aasaasiga ah ayaa ah meel badbaado leh oo laga bilaabo qoys kasta.
steps: Jadwal u samee 3-4 dhaqdhaqaaq dhaqdhaqaaq maalintii oo dhan - ka dib markaad toosto, cuntada ka hor, iyo ka hor hawlaha diirada la saaray.
Bixi doorashooyin: ku boodboodka tarampoline, lulid, socodka xayawaanka (socodka orso, socodka carsaanyada), ama qoob ka ciyaarka muusikada.
Ku ilaali nasasho kasta 5-10 daqiiqo - ku filan si aad u nidaamiso adoon noqonin mid kiciya.
Isticmaal saacad-muuqaal si uu ilmahaagu u ogaado marka nasashadu bilaabanto iyo inay dhammaato, una dhisto saadaalinta.
sources: Harkla — Sensory Diet Activities (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)
STAR Institute — Home Sensory Activities (sensoryhealth.org/basic/home-activities)
Sensory Smarts — Sensory Diet Activities (sensorysmarts.com/sensory_diet_activities.html)

whyItMatters: Gelida cadaadiska qoto dheer - tuujin adag, walxaha miisaanka leh, laabta adag - waxay saameyn dejin ku leedahay nidaamka dareenka ee carruur badan oo autism ah. Noocan ka mid ah talooyinka la-hawlgalayaasha ahi waxa ay yarayn kartaa walaaca, wanaajin kartaa wacyiga jidhka, iyo caawinta carruurta in ay ka gudbaan xaalad sare oo ay u gudbaan mid nidaamsan. Waa mid ka mid ah xeeladaha dareenka waxtarka leh ee caalamiga ah.
steps: Isku day 'duubka burrito': ilmahaaga si fiican ugu duub buste oo cadaadis khafiif ah u mari jirkooda.
Bixi suuf dhabo miisaan leh ama xayawaan cufan inta lagu jiro hawlaha fadhiga - ujeedo qiyaastii 10% miisaanka jidhka.
Ciyaar 'sandwij': ilmahaagu wuxuu dhex seexdaa barkimada sariiraha markaad si tartiib ah u cadaadinayso.
Bar ilmahaaga inuu codsado cadaadis qoto dheer: 'Ma waxaad rabtaa cadaadis weyn?' si ay iskood ugu doodaan.
sources: STAR Institute — Proprioceptive Input Activities (sensoryhealth.org/basic/home-activities)
Harkla — Deep Pressure Therapy for Autism (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)
Autism Research Institute — Sensory-Friendly Strategies (autism.org/sensory-friendly-strategies-at-home-p2/)

whyItMatters: Dareen-xumada maqalka ayaa aad ugu badan carruurta autism-ka. Maalin kasta waxay u dhawaaqaan sida nadiifiyeyaasha vacuum, qalajiyaasha gacmaha, ama meelaha dadku ku badan yahay waxay keeni karaan xanuun iyo murugo. Bar carruurta si ay u maareeyaan dareenka dhawaaqa - iyada oo loo marayo isbeddellada deegaanka iyo xeeladaha la qabsiga labadaba - waxay si weyn u wanaajisaa awooddooda ka qaybgalka nolol maalmeedka.
steps: Aqoonso dhawaaqyada ugu adag ee ilmahaaga adiga oo eegaya - ogow marka ay dhegaha daboolaan ama ay murugaysan yihiin.
Sii samee taleefoonnada dhegaha la gashado ama dhegaha lagu xidho oo bar ilmahaaga inuu si madaxbannaan u isticmaalo.
Sii digniin horudhac ah ka hor inta aanay dhawaaqin dhawaaq dheer marka ay suurtogal tahay: 'Waxaan ku daaran doonaa blender 5 ilbiriqsi gudahood.'
Samee meel bannaan oo 'sanqad ammaan ah' guriga dhexdiisa halkaas oo cunugaada uu dib ugu laaban karo marka uu ka bato - gees deggan oo iftiin jilicsan leh.
sources: Autism Research Institute — Sensory-Friendly Strategies at Home (autism.org/sensory-friendly-strategies-at-home-p2/)
Sensory Smarts — Auditory Sensitivity (sensorysmarts.com/sensory_diet_activities.html)
STAR Institute — Sensory Processing and Autism (sensoryhealth.org)

whyItMatters: Difaaca taabashada leh - ka fogaansho qoraallada qaarkood, nacaybka ciyaarta wasakhaysan, iska caabinta dharka qaarkood - waxay ku badan tahay carruurta autism-ka. Tartiib tartiib ah, soo-gaadhista cayaarta ee qaababka kala duwan waxay yareyn kartaa dareenka waqti ka dib iyada oo aan la abuurin ururo xun. Hadafku waa balaadhinta raaxada, maaha in lagu qasbo dulqaadka.
steps: Ku billow textures ee ilmahaagu mar horeba u dulqaatay oo soo bixi ikhtiyaaro kala duwan oo ay la socdaan: bariis engegan oo ku xiga cajiinka, maro siman oo ku xigta jahawareerka.
Soo bandhig ciyaar qalafsan oo leh kontorool ku dhex jira: rinjiyeynta faraha ee bacda sibka-qufulka, ama daldaloolada ciyaarta cajiinka ul.
U ogolow ilmahaagu inuu dejiyo xawaaraha - taabasho kooban waa fiican tahay. Weligaa ha ku qasbin xidhiidhka dheer ee textures ka soo horjeeda.
Ku xidh ciyaarta qaab-dhismeedka iyo xiisaha: haddii ilmahaagu jecel yahay dinosaurs, ku qari dinos yaryar weelka digirta ah si ay u helaan.
sources: Harkla — Tactile Sensory Activities (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)
STAR Institute — Tactile Processing Activities (sensoryhealth.org/basic/home-activities)

whyItMatters: Jadwalka dareenka muuqaalku wuxuu ka caawiyaa carruurta inay odorosaan oo u diyaargaroobaan waayo-aragnimada dareenka maalinta oo dhan. Ogaanshaha goorta la filayo gelinta dareenka adag (ururka qaylada, wakhtiga qubeyska) iyo marka la heli karo gelinta dejinta (nasasho lulid, wakhti aamusan) waxay siisaa carruurta dareenka xakamaynta taas oo yaraynaysa welwelka iyo hoos u dhaca.
steps: Samee jadwal maalinle ah oo muuqaal ah kaas oo calaamadiya labadaba daqiiqadaha dareenka ee adag iyo nasashada la dhisay.
Isticmaal summada midabaynta: cagaar si aad u dejiso dhaqdhaqaaqyada, jaalaha dhexdhexaadka ah, casaanka ah mid aad u culus.
Kahor inta aanad hawlo adag qaban, tilmaan jadwalka: 'Maqaaxida buuqa badan ka dib, waxaad haysataa wakhti akhris oo xasilloon.'
Subax kasta dib u eeg jadwalka si ilmahaagu u ogaado waxa laga filayo oo uu ugu diyaargaroobo dareen ahaan.
sources: Raising Children Network — Visual Supports (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/visual-supports)
TEACCH — Structured Teaching and Visual Schedules (teacch.com)
Harkla — Sensory Diet Scheduling (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)

whyItMatters: Carruur badan oo autistic ah ayaa raadiya ama ka fogaada gelinta dareenka afka - waxaa laga yaabaa inay ruugaan dharka, ka fogaadaan walxaha cuntada qaarkood, ama walxaha afka ee dhaafa da'da caadiga ah. Bixinta qalabka dareenka afka ee ku habboon ayaa baahidan si badbaado leh u daboolaya waxayna hagaajin kartaa diiradda, yaraynta welwelka, iyo taageeridda dabacsanaanta wakhtiga cuntada.
steps: U fiirso qaabka dareenka afka ee ilmahaaga: ma ruqaan, ma ruqaan, ama ka fogaadaan fikradda afka ah?
Kuwa wax cuna: sii silsilad ammaan ah oo lagu qayilo ama tuubo lagu qayilo si loogu beddelo calalinta shaadhka ama qalinleyda.
Loogu talagalay dadka crunchy doonka ah: ku dar cunto fudud oo qallafsan (karootada, pretzels, xaleef tufaax ah) waqtiyo joogto ah maalintii oo dhan.
Kuwa afka ka fogaada: isticmaal burushka cadayga gariiraya si kooban dibnaha iyo dhabannada inta ciyaarta lagu jiro si aad tartiib tartiib ugu dhisto dulqaad.
sources: Sensory Smarts — Oral Sensory Activities (sensorysmarts.com/sensory_diet_activities.html)
STAR Institute — Oral Motor Activities (sensoryhealth.org/basic/home-activities)
Harkla — Oral Sensory Input (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)

whyItMatters: Kala-guurka iyo saadaalin la'aanta ayaa ah isha ugu weyn ee walaaca carruur badan oo autism ah. Jadwalka subaxnimo ee aragga ah waxa uu u beddelaa dalabaadka isdaba jooga ee xad dhaafka ah una beddela tillaabooyin taxane ah oo la saadaalin karo, la maarayn karo. Cilmi-baadhistu waxay si joogto ah u tustaa in taageerada muuqaalku ay yarayso dabeecadaha adag oo ay kordhiso madaxbannaanida xirfadaha nolol maalmeedka.
steps: Jadwalka subaxda u kala qaybi 5-7 tillaabo fudud: toosi, isticmaal musqusha, xidho, quraac cun, ilka caday, kabo xidh, tag.
U samee kaarar muuqaal ah oo leh sawiro ama sawiro tillaabo kasta - sawirada dhabta ah ee ilmahaagu qabanayo waxqabad kasta ayaa si fiican u shaqeeya.
U diyaari kaadhadhka si toosan gidaarka ilaa heerka isha ilmahaaga adigoo isticmaalaya velcro ama magnets.
Subax kasta si wada jir ah u dhex mara jadwalka, una oggolow ilmahaagu inuu kaar kasta u wareejiyo tiir 'la sameeyay' markay dhammeeyaan.
sources: Raising Children Network — Visual Supports for Daily Routines (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/visual-supports)
TEACCH — Daily Living Routines (teacch.com/daily-living-routines/)
A Day in Our Shoes — Free Visual Schedule Templates (adayinourshoes.com/free-printable-visual-schedules-for-home-and-daily-routines/)

whyItMatters: Daryeelka afka ayaa caqabad weyn ku ah carruur badan oo autism-ka qaba taasoo ay ugu wacan tahay dareenka dareenka afka. Gariirka buraashka cadayga ee korontada ku shaqeeya, dhadhanka daawada cadayga, iyo dareenka bristles ayaa dhamaantood noqon kara mid xad dhaaf ah. Habka tartiib-tartiib-celinta waxay ixtiraamaysaa waayo-aragnimada dareenka ilmahaaga marka la dhisayo xagga xirfaddan nolol maalmeedka lagama maarmaanka ah.
steps: Ka bilow inaad u ogolaato ilmahaagu inuu qabsado oo baadho cadayga adoon filaynin cadayashada.
Soo bandhig burushka cadayga oo taabanaya dibnaha oo keliya, ka dibna ilkaha hore - u dabbaaldeg tillaabo kasta ammaan gaar ah.
Isticmaal dawada cadayga ee dhadhanka leh ee ilmahaagu doorto ama ha isticmaalin marka hore - nadiifinta makaanikada ayaa ugu muhiimsan.
Dhis buraash 30-ilbiriqsi ah, ka dibna 1 daqiiqo, adoo isticmaalaya saacad muuqaal ah ama hees gaaban si aad u calaamadiso muddada.
sources: Behavioral Innovations — Independent Living Skills (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/teach-independent-living-skills-kids-with-autism/)
Raising Children Network — Dental Care and Autism (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/health-wellbeing/dental-care/dental-care-autism)
STAR Institute — Oral Sensory Desensitization (sensoryhealth.org)

skill: Dabacsanaanta wakhtiga cuntada: Soo bandhigida Cuntooyin Cusub
whyItMatters: Xulashada cuntadu aad bay ugu badan tahay carruurta autistic-ka ah, oo inta badan ay kaxeeyaan arrimo dareen sida midabka, midabka, urta, ama heerkulka. Nidaamyada cunnada ee adag waxay saameyn karaan nafaqada waxayna abuuri karaan walaac inta lagu jiro cuntada qoyska. Si tartiib tartiib ah, habka cadaadiska hooseeya ee soo-gaadhista cuntada ayaa ka caawisa ballaarinta cuntada waqti ka dib iyada oo aan la abuurin xiriiro xun oo waqtiyada cuntada ah.
steps: Dhig qayb yar oo cunto cusub ah saxanka oo ay weheliyaan cuntooyinka la door biday - wax shardi ah uma aha in la cuno ama la taabto.
Moodeey adiga oo cunaya cuntada cusub faallooyin wanaagsan oo ku saabsan hantideeda: 'Tani waa qallafsanaan!'
U dabbaaldeg fal-gal kasta oo lala yeesho cuntada cusub - fiiri, taabasho, ur, leefsii - dhammaan waxa lagu tiriyaa horumar.
Sii cunto cusub oo isku mid ah ugu yaraan 10-15 jeer ka hor intaadan go'aansanin haddii ilmahaagu runtii neceb yahay - soo-gaadhista soo noqnoqda ayaa beddeleysa jawaabaha.
sources: Autism Speaks — Feeding Issues and Autism (autismspeaks.org/expert-opinion/what-are-common-feeding-issues-associated-autism)
Raising Children Network — Eating and Autism (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/health-wellbeing/nutrition-fitness/eating-autism)
SPARK for Autism — Daily Living Skills (sparkforautism.org/discover_article/daily-living-skills-a-key-to-independence-for-people-with-autism/)

whyItMatters: Silsilad-celinta dambe waa farsamada ABA halkaas oo aad ka caawinayso dhammaan tillaabooyinka marka laga reebo ta u dambaysa, kaas oo ilmuhu si madax-bannaan u dhammaystiro. Tani waxay dhistaa guusha iyo dhiirigelinta sababtoo ah ilmuhu had iyo jeer wuu dhameeyaa hawsha. Labbiska, tani waxay la macno tahay in ilmuhu la kulmo ku qanacsanaanta 'waan sameeyay!' xitaa iyadoo weli la baranayo tallaabooyinkii hore.
steps: Dooro hal shay oo dhar ah oo aad ku tababarato: ku bilow surwaalka jiidista maadaama ay leedahay tillaabooyin yar.
Ka caawi ilmahaaga dhammaan tillaabooyinka marka laga reebo kan ugu dambeeya - waxaad soo jiidataa surwaalka ilaa miskaha, waxay kor u qaadaan inch ugu dambeeya.
Marka tallaabada ugu dambeysa ay madaxbannaan tahay, ku dar tallaabada labaad-ilaa-dambe: waxay ka soo jiidaan bowdada ilaa dhexda.
Dib u wad ilaa ilmahaagu si madaxbanaan u dhamaystirayo taxanaha oo dhan.
sources: Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis: Backward Chaining (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
Behavioral Innovations — Teaching Independent Living Skills (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/teach-independent-living-skills-kids-with-autism/)
Chicago ABA Therapy — Task Analysis and Chaining (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/how-parents-can-practice-aba-therapy-at-home/)

whyItMatters: Tababarka musqusha inta badan waxay ku qaadataa waqti dheer carruurta autism-ka ah waxayna u baahan yihiin habab wax laga beddelay. Riixitaanka ka hor inta uusan ilmuhu muujin calaamadaha diyaargarowga waxay abuuri kartaa walaac iyo iska caabin. Habka habaysan, dareenka ku baraarugsan ee leh taageerooyinka aragga ayaa la muujiyay inuu yahay kan ugu waxtarka badan. Carruur badan oo autistic ah ayaa si fiican uga jawaaba jadwalka la saadaalin karo iyo rajooyinka muuqda ee cad.
steps: Ka fiirso calaamadaha u-diyaargarowga: qallajinta 2+ saacadood, muujinta wacyiga xafaayadda qoyan/ wasakhaysan, xiisaha musqusha.
U samee nidaam muuqaal ah oo fudud oo musqusha ah: surwaal hoos, fadhiiso, isku day, tirtir, dhaqdhaqaaji, surwaal kor, dhaq gacmaha.
Ku bilow fadhiyo jadwalsan (1-2 saacadood kasta) intii aad sugi lahayd in ilmuhu tilmaamo - isticmaal saacad muuqaal ah.
U dabaaldeg guusha isla markaaba xoojiye la door biday, oo si dhexdhexaad ah uga jawaab shilalka - waligaa ha ciqaabin.
sources: Raising Children Network — Toilet Training and Autism (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/health-wellbeing/toileting-hygiene/toilet-training-autism)
Autism Little Learners — Free Toileting Sequence (autismlittlelearners.com/free-toileting-sequence/)
Autism Speaks — Toilet Training Guide (autismspeaks.org/tool-kit/atn-air-p-toilet-training)

whyItMatters: Gacmo-dhaqashadu waxay ku lug leedahay tillaabo-hoosaadyo badan oo aad u culus marka loo soo bandhigo hal tilmaam. U kala qaybinta falanqaynta hawsha muuqaalku waxay ka dhigtaa habka caadiga ah mid la baran karo oo la soo celin karo. Carruurta Autistic-ku waxay inta badan si fiican uga jawaabaan isku xigxiga isku xiga mar kasta, iyo marka la barto, gacma-dhaqashadu waxay noqotaa caado toos ah oo taageerta caafimaadka iyo madax-bannaanida.
steps: Ku dheji faashad muuqaal ah oo aan biyuhu lahayn agteeda saxanka iyadoo tillaabo kasta lagu sawiray: biyo dul saaran, gacmo qoyan, saabuun, xoq 20 ilbiriqsi, biyo raaci, qallaji.
U isticmaal hees-gacmo-dhaqista ama saacadda 20-da ilbiriqsi tallaabada xoqidda - carruur badan ayaa ku raaxaysta calaamaddan la saadaalin karo.
Ku celceli waqtiyada xasilloon, waqtiyada aan degdega ahayn marka hore - maaha marka aad ku degdegto inaad wax cunto.
Tartiib tartiib u libdhi soo jeedintaada odhaaheed: tilmaan xariijimaha muuqaalka ah intii aad ka sheekayn lahayd tillaabo kasta.
sources: CDC — Handwashing: Clean Hands Save Lives (cdc.gov/hand-washing/)
TEACCH — Daily Living Routines: Task Analysis (teacch.com/daily-living-routines/)
Behavioral Innovations — Independent Living Skills (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/teach-independent-living-skills-kids-with-autism/)

whyItMatters: Dhibaatooyinka hurdada waxay saameeyaan 40-80% carruurta autism-ka. Hurdo xumadu waxay xumaysaa dhaqanka, dareenka, iyo waxbarashada inta lagu jiro maalinta. Jadwalka sariirta oo joogto ah, dareen ku baraarugsan ayaa ah faragelinta kaliya ee ugu waxtarka badan ee aan caafimaadka ahayn ee hagaajinta hurdada. Nidaamku waa inuu noqdaa mid la saadaalin karo, dejiyo, oo ku habboon dookhyada dareenka ilmahaaga.
steps: Samee habayn joogto ah oo 30-daqiiqo ah oo hurdo ah: qubeyska/dhaqista, dharka jiifka, ilkaha cadayda, hal buug, nal shid - isku habayn habeen kasta.
Ka dhig deegaanka mid hurdo u leh: daahyada madow, heerkulka qabow, qaylada cad haddii ay waxtar leedahay, ka saar shaashadaha 1 saac ka hor sariirta.
Isticmaal jadwalka wakhtiga jiifka ee muuqaalka ah si ilmahaagu ula socdo oo u odoroso tillaabo kasta.
Haddii ilmahaagu diido sariirta, isticmaal 'kaadhka wakhtiga jiifka' - hal kaar oo ay ku beddelan karaan hal codsi oo kooban oo la aqbali karo (cabbid biyo ah, hal laabasho kale).
sources: Autism Speaks — Sleep Resources (autismspeaks.org/sleep)
Raising Children Network — Sleep and Autism (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/health-wellbeing/sleep/sleep-problems-autism)
AAP — Healthy Sleep Habits for Children (aap.org)

whyItMatters: Cunto karintu waxay ku lug leedahay raacitaanka taxanaha, xirfadaha dhaqdhaqaaqa dhaqdhaqaaqa wanaagsan, sahaminta dareenka, iyo fikradaha xisaabta - dhammaantood waxay ku jiraan macnaha dhiirigelinta dabiiciga ah. Carruurta autismka qaba, hawlo karinta fudud waxay dhisaan madaxbannaani, balaadhiyaan dulqaadka cuntada, iyo abuurista is-dhexgalka qoyska. Qaabka habaysan, ee tillaabo-tallaabo dabeecadda cunnooyinka ayaa si fiican ula jaan qaadaya inta carruur ah ee autism-ku si fiican u bartaan.
steps: Ku bilow cunto karis la'aan ah: ururinta sandwich, samaynta isku darka raadadka, ama ku faafidda subagga lawska ee buskudka.
U samee kaadhka cunto karinta ee muuqaalka leh oo sawiro tallaabo kasta ah - ilmahaagu wuxuu hubin karaa tillaabooyinka marka ay socdaan.
U qoondee hawlo gaar ah oo cad: 'Ku shub koobka daqiiqda weelka' intii aad 'i caawin lahayd samaynta buskudka'.
Si wada jir ah ugu dabaaldega alaabta dhammaatay: cunista waxaad wada samayseen waa xoojin dabiici ah oo awood leh.
sources: Accessible Chef — Free Visual Recipes (accessiblechef.com)
SPARK for Autism — Daily Living Skills (sparkforautism.org/discover_article/daily-living-skills-a-key-to-independence-for-people-with-autism/)
Behavioral Innovations — Teaching Independent Living Skills (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/teach-independent-living-skills-kids-with-autism/)

whyItMatters: Qabashada biinanka - iyadoo la isticmaalayo suulka iyo farta murdisada oo wadajira - waxay lama huraan u tahay qorista, badhanka dharka, siibadaha, iyo wax ku cunista maacuunta. Carruur badan oo autism-ka qaba ayaa ka faa'iideysta tababar dheeraad ah iyagoo xirfaddan ku jira madadaalo, dhiirigelin leh. Xirfadaha dhaqdhaqaaqa wanaagsan ee xoogga leh waxay sidoo kale taageeraan madaxbannaanida is-daryeelka iyo hawlaha tacliinta.
steps: Samee hawl fudud adoo isticmaalaya danaha ilmahaaga - soo qaadista tareenada yaryar, dhigista qadaadiicda bangiga doofaarka, ama dhejinta dhejisyada.
Model si tartiib ah u qabso biinarka oo ka sheekee: 'Waxaan isticmaalayaa farahayga qanjaruufka ah si aan u soo qaato sabiibka.'
Sii caawimo gacan-qabsi ah oo keliya haddii ilmahaagu niyad-jabsan yahay - ka dibna si dhakhso ah u baabi'i taageeradaada.
Ku celceli 5 daqiiqo markiiba, kor u qaad - fadhiyada gaaban ee guusha leh ayaa ka wanaagsan kuwa jahawareersan.
sources: Tree Top ABA — Fine Motor Skills Activities for Autism (thetreetop.com/aba-therapy/fine-motor-skills-activities-for-autism)
Children's Hospital Los Angeles — Fine Motor Skills in Autism (chla.org/blog/rehab-therapies-and-audiology/promoting-and-developing-fine-motor-skills-children-autism)

whyItMatters: Xirfadaha dhaqdhaqaaqa guud sida fuulista, boodboodka, isu dheelitirka, iyo gurguurashada waxay taageeraan nidaaminta dareenka, wacyiga jidhka, iyo kalsoonida jidhka. Koorsada caqabada ahi waxay isku daraysaa qorshaynta mootada (in la ogaanayo SIDA koorsada loo maro) iyo xirfado jireed, waxaana lagu qabsan karaa heer kasta oo karti ah. Carruur badan oo autismka qaba oo ku halgama ciyaaraha tartanka ayaa ku baraara koorsada ciyaarta caqabada ah.
steps: Samee koorsada 4-ta saldhig ee fudud adigoo isticmaalaya alaabta guriga: ku gurguurto buste hoostiisa, ka gudub barkimada, ku bood hula hoop, ku tuur dambiisha.
Marka hore wada mara koorsada, adigoo muujinaya saldhig kasta inta ilmahaagu daawanayo.
Isticmaal fallaaro muuqaal ah ama cajalad dhulka si aad u muujiso waddada - tani waxay yaraynaysaa baahida tilmaamaha afka ah.
Dabaaldega dhammaystirka oo si tartiib tartiib ah ugu dar saldhig ama kordhi dhib inta ilmahaagu uu dhisayo kalsoonida.
sources: Golden Steps ABA — Gross Motor Skills in Children with Autism (goldenstepsaba.com/resources/gross-motor-skills-in-children-with-autism/)
Harkla — Sensory Diet: Proprioceptive and Vestibular Activities (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)

whyItMatters: Isticmaalka maqas wuxuu u baahan yahay isuduwidda laba geesoodka ah (hal gacan ayaa warqad ku haysaa, ta kalena gooyn), is dhexgalka mootooyinka, iyo xoogga dhaqdhaqaaqa wanaagsan. Xirfadahani waxay u wareegaan hawlo kale oo badan waxaana laga filayaa dugsiyada barbaarinta iyo goobaha barbaarinta. Hordhac tartiib ah oo leh qalab la isku habeeyey ayaa tan ka dhigaysa mid la gaari karo carruurta intooda badan.
steps: Ku bilow warqad jeexjeexi - tani waxay dhistaa xoogga gacanta iyo isuduwidda laba geesoodka ah ee loo baahan yahay maqasyada.
Soo bandhig maqas tababar gu' ku raran oo si toos ah u furma - ilmahaagu wuxuu u baahan yahay oo kaliya inuu tuujiyo si uu u xidho.
Ku celceli marka hore inaad gooyso cajiinka 'maska' - way fududahay in la haysto oo cafiyo badan warqadda.
Horumarka lagu jarayo xariiqyo dhumuc weyn, oo toosan oo warqad ah, ka dibna xariiqyo qalloocan, ka dibna qaabab fudud.
sources: Children's Hospital Los Angeles — Fine Motor Skills in Autism (chla.org/blog/rehab-therapies-and-audiology/promoting-and-developing-fine-motor-skills-children-autism)
Tree Top ABA — Fine Motor Activities (thetreetop.com/aba-therapy/fine-motor-skills-activities-for-autism)

skill: Baraarujinta Jirka: Hawlaha Shaqo ee Culus
whyItMatters: Talo-siinta saxda ah - macluumaadka laga helo murqaha iyo kala-goysyada ee ku saabsan booska jirka - waxay ka caawisaa carruurta inay fahmaan halka jirkoodu ku yaal meel bannaan. Carruur badan oo autistic ah ayaa hoos u dhigay wacyiga lahaanshaha, taasoo keentay jahwareer, wax ku dhacaan, ama raadiyaan fikrado jireed oo xoogan. Hawlaha culus ee shaqada waxay bixiyaan talooyinka murqaha qoto dheer ee dhisa wacyiga jirka.
steps: Ku dar shaqo culus hawl maalmeedka: qaadashada bacaha cuntada, riixida dambiisha dharka lagu dhaqdo, ama jiidista gaadhiga.
Abuur 'shaqo' kuwaas oo bixiya fikrado la taaban karo: ururinta buugaag culus, cajiin cajiinka, ama qodista beerta.
Isku day in darbiga la riixo ama kursi la riixo si dhaqsaha leh loo xakameeyo hawlaha fadhiga ka hor.
U soo bandhig waxqabadyadan si firfircoon ka hor inta aanad xaaladaha adag - waa ka hortag, ma aha oo kaliya falcelin.
sources: STAR Institute — Proprioceptive Activities (sensoryhealth.org/basic/home-activities)
Harkla — Heavy Work Activities for Sensory Processing (harkla.co/blogs/special-needs/sensory-diet)
Sensory Smarts — Proprioceptive Activities (sensorysmarts.com/sensory_diet_activities.html)

skill: U Diyaargarowga Qoraalka: Kahor Qorista Strokes
whyItMatters: Kahor intaanay carruurtu samayn xarfaha, waxay u baahan yihiin inay si fiican u yaqaanaan istaroogga aasaasiga ah: xariiqyo toosan, xariiqyo toosan, wareegyo, iskutallaabyo, iyo daafooyin. Xirfadahan wax-qorista ka hor waxay ku koraan dhaqdhaqaaq ballaaran marka hore (ku sawirida sabuurad cad ama ciid) ka hor inta aan lagu sifayn qalin-qori-warqad. Bilaabidda weyn waxay yaraynaysaa niyad-jabka waxayna dhistaa xusuusta dhaqdhaqaaqa.
steps: Ku bilow xariijimo toosan: kor ilaa hoos ku sawir sabuurad wayn, kareem xiirashada, ama ciid.
U gudub xariiqyada toosan, ka dibna wareegyada - had iyo jeer bilow weyn oo si tartiib tartiib ah u yareeya cabbirka.
Adeegso habab badan oo dareen leh: ku raadso qaababka raad-raac ee pudding, ku sawir tamaashiirta waddada dhinaceeda, ama isticmaal rinjiga faraha.
Ku xidh istaroogga macnaha: 'Aan sawirno roobka!' (xariiq toosan) ama 'Aan sawirno qorraxda!' (goobo leh khadadka).
sources: Apple ABA Care — Teaching Handwriting to Kids with Autism (appleabacare.com/aba-autism-therapy/teaching-hand-writing-to-kids-with-autism/)
Reading Rockets — Structured Teaching for Autism (readingrockets.org/topics/autism-spectrum-disorder/articles/structured-teaching-strategies-students-autism-spectrum)

whyItMatters: Xoojinta togan - abaal marinta habdhaqanka la rabo isla markiiba - waa qalabka kaliya ee ugu waxtarka badan ee lagu dhiso xirfado cusub laguna dhimo dabeecadaha adag. Furaha ayaa ah in la aqoonsado waxa dhabta ah ee dhiirigeliya ilmahaaga (taas oo laga yaabo inay aad uga duwan tahay abaal-marinaha caadiga ah) iyo bixinta isla markiiba ka dib habdhaqanka bartilmaameedka. Tani waa aasaaska hababka ku saleysan ABA.
steps: Samee liis 5-10 shay oo uu ilmahaagu u arko inay si dhab ah u dhiirigeliyaan: cunto fudud, alaab-ciyaareed gaar ah, wakhtiga shaashadda, tickles, ammaan, muusik.
Dooro hal dhaqan oo gaar ah si aad u xoojiso: samaynta indhaha, adoo isticmaalaya kalmad, fadhiya miiska 1 daqiiqo.
Bixi abaalmarinta isla markiiba dhaqanka ka dib - 1-2 ilbiriqsi gudahood haddii ay suurtagal tahay.
Si gaar ah u ammaan ammaantaada: 'Shaqo aad u wanaagsan oo leh fadlan!' ayaa ka wanaagsan 'wiil wanaagsan'.
sources: Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis: Positive Reinforcement (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
Behavioral Innovations — ABA Strategies at Home (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/implement-aba-therapy-strategies-at-home/)
Chicago ABA Therapy — Parents Practice ABA at Home (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/how-parents-can-practice-aba-therapy-at-home/)

whyItMatters: Meltdowns ma aha xanaaq - waa jawaabo aan qasab ahayn ee baahida dareenka, shucuurta, ama garashada xad dhaafka ah. Fahamka faraqa waa muhiim. Markaad barato inaad aqoonsato calaamadaha digniinta hore iyo waxyaabaha kiciya ee ilmahaaga, waxaad inta badan soo dhex geli kartaa ka hor inta uusan dhalaalku gaarin heerka ugu sarreeya. Ka-hortagga ayaa aad uga waxtar badan maaraynta inta lagu jiro xiisadda.
steps: Raad raac qaababka: u fiirso wixii dhacay ka hor 5 dhalaalid ee ugu dambeeyay - wakhtiga maalinta, dejinta, dalabaadka, jawiga dareenka.
Aqoonso calaamadaha digniinta hore ee ilmahaaga: kicinta kordhay, daboolida dhegaha, qallafsanaanta, ku celcelinta weedhaha, ka noqoshada.
Markaad aragto calaamadaha hore, isla markaaba yaree dalabaadka: hoos u dhig codkaaga, bixi nasasho, ka saar kiciyeyaasha dareenka.
Dhallaanka ka dib, sug ilaa ilmahaagu si buuxda u is dejiyo ka hor inta aanad ka hadlin waxa dhacay - iska ilaali muxaadarada inta lagu jiro soo kabashada.
sources: Autism Parenting Magazine — 25 Emotional Regulation Techniques (autismparentingmagazine.com/help-child-with-emotional-regulation/)
How to ABA — Emotional Regulation in Autism (howtoaba.com/emotional-regulation-in-autism/)
Advanced Autism Services — Creating a Calm-Down Corner (advancedautism.com/post/creating-a-calm-down-corner-for-autism)

whyItMatters: Qaab dhismeedka Aagagga Xeerku waxa ay adeegsadaan summada midabaynta si ay u caawiyaan carruurta in ay gartaan xaaladdooda shucuureed: Buluug ( murugo/daalan ), Cagaar (degan/ diyaarsan), Jaalle (naxsan/warwarsan), Casaan (cadhaysan/ argagaxsan). Carruurta autistic-ka ah ee la halgamaya aqoonsiga dareenka, nidaamkan muuqaalku wuxuu ka dhigayaa dareen aan la taaban karin wuxuuna baraa wacyiga nafta taasoo horseedda is-xakamaynta.
steps: Ku soo bandhig afarta aag muuqaallo fudud: Buluug = murugo/hurdo, Cagaar = degganaansho/farxad leh, Jaalle = neerfayaasha/ niyad jabsan, Casaan = xanaaq/cabsi.
Maalintii oo dhan, moodeel tilmaamaya aaggaaga: 'Waxaan hadda dareemayaa wax yar oo huruud ah sababtoo ah waan soo daahnay.'
Weydii cunugaada inuu aqoonsado aagagooda waqtiyada la saadaalin karo: subaxda, dugsiga kadib, ka hor sariirta.
Ku xidh aagagga xeeladaha: 'Markaad ku jirto Jaalle, waxaad qaadan kartaa 5 neefsasho qoto dheer ama tuujin kubbadaada walaaca.'
sources: Zones of Regulation — Official Framework (zonesofregulation.com)
How to ABA — Emotional Regulation in Autism (howtoaba.com/emotional-regulation-in-autism/)
Autism Parenting Magazine — Emotional Regulation Techniques (autismparentingmagazine.com/help-child-with-emotional-regulation/)

whyItMatters: Kala-guurka degdega ahi waa kicinta ugu sarreysa ee dabeecadda adag ee carruurta autism-ka. Saacadaha muuqaalku waxay ka dhigaan marinka wakhtiga wax la taaban karo oo muuqda - carruurtu waxay si dhab ah u arki karaan wakhtigu, taas oo yaraynaysa yaabka iyo welwelka beddelka hawlaha. Qalabkan fudud wuxuu si weyn u yareeyn karaa dhalaalka la xiriira kala-guurka.
steps: Hel saacad muqaal (sida saacada wakhtiga) ama isticmaal abka saacada kaas oo muujinaya wakhtiga midabkiisu sii luminayo.
Bilow inaad u isticmaasho kala-guurka u dhexeeya hawlaha la door bidayo: 'Marka casaanku baxo, iPad-ka ayaanu iska saarnay.'
Sii digniin afka ah saacad-hayaha: 'Fiiri - 2 daqiiqo ayaa hadhay!' oo tilmaan saacad-bixiyaha.
Marka uu saacaduhu maqan yahay, si deggan oo joogto ah ula soco - saacaduhu waa maamulka, adiga maaha.
sources: Raising Children Network — Visual Supports (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/visual-supports)
TEACCH — Structured Teaching and Visual Supports (teacch.com)
Autism Classroom Resources — Visual Schedule Series (autismclassroomresources.com/visual-schedule-series-first-then/)

whyItMatters: Dabeecad kastaa waxay ku dhacdaa sabab. Afarta hawlood ee ugu waaweyn ee hab-dhaqanku waa: in la helo shay (fiiri, shay, hawlqabad), in laga baxsado shay (baahida, dareenka dareenka, xaaladda bulshada), kicinta dareenka, ama is-xakamaynta. Fahamka SABABTA ilmahaagu wax u qabto ayaa fure u ah doorashada jawaab-celin wax ku ool ah halkii aad kaga falcelin lahayd niyad jab.
steps: Marka dabeecad adagi dhacdo, u fiirso ABC: Horudhac (waxa dhacay wax yar ka hor), Dabeecadda (sida saxda ah waxa ilmuhu sameeyay), Natiijadii (maxaa dhacay ka dib).
Raadi qaabab ka badan 5-10 dhacdo: dabeecadda inta badan ma dhacdaa ka hor inta aan la dalban? Ka dib markii lagu yiri 'maya'? Deegaannada qaylada dheer?
Ku habboon shaqada iyo dabeecadda beddelka: haddii ay u qayliyaan si ay qaylada uga baxsadaan, bar inay codsadaan taleefoonnada gacanta.
Ka dhig hab-dhaqanka beddelka mid ka fudud ama ka fudud hab-dhaqanka adag - waa in ay si fiican u 'shaqayso' ilmaha.
sources: Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis: Functional Assessment (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
PMC — Scoping Review: ABA as Evidence-Based Practice (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9458805/)
Behavioral Innovations — ABA Strategies at Home (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/implement-aba-therapy-strategies-at-home/)

whyItMatters: Neefsashada qoto dheer waxay hawlgelisaa habdhiska dareenka parasympathetic, kaas oo si dabiici ah u yareeya welwelka iyo kacsiga. Carruurta autistic-ka ah, tilmaamaha aan la taaban karin sida 'si qoto dheer u neefso' ayaa laga yaabaa inaysan waxtar lahayn. Farsamooyinka neefsashada muuqaalka ah ee la taaban karo - sida xumbo afuufaya, ubaxa uraya, ama ku afuufinta giraangiraha - waxay ka dhigtaa istaraatiijiyadan is-xakamaynta mid la heli karo oo xitaa madadaalo leh.
steps: Ku celceli waqtiyada xasiloon marka hore - waligaa ha soo bandhigin xeelad cusub inta lagu jiro burburka.
Isticmaal dardaaran la taaban karo: 'Urta ubaxa' (sanka ka neefso) iyo 'ka afuufi shumaca' ( afka ka neefso).
Isticmaal qalabyada dhabta ah: xumbo, pinwheels, ama baalal dhaqaaqa marka ilmahaagu neefsanayo - tani waxay ka dhigaysaa neefta muuqata.
Ku celceli 3 neefsasho wadajir ah waqtiyada la saadaalin karo: cuntada ka hor, ka hor inta aanad guriga ka bixin, wakhtiga jiifka.
sources: How to ABA — Emotional Regulation in Autism (howtoaba.com/emotional-regulation-in-autism/)
Autism Parenting Magazine — Calming Techniques (autismparentingmagazine.com/help-child-with-emotional-regulation/)
Advanced Autism Services — Calm-Down Corner for Autism (advancedautism.com/post/creating-a-calm-down-corner-for-autism)

whyItMatters: Dhaqaalaha calaamaduhu waxa uu xidhaa farqiga u dhexeeya qabashada hawsha iyo helitaanka abaal-marin. Carruurtu waxay kasbadaan calaamadaha (xiddigaha, dhejiska, calaamadaha hubinta) dabeecadaha gaarka ah waxayna ku beddelaan abaalmarin weyn. Tani waxay baraysaa ku qanacsanaanta daahday, waxay ka dhigaysaa horumar muuqda, waxayna kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad ku xoojiso dhaqamo badan maalintii oo dhan adigoo isticmaalaya hal nidaam oo dhiirigelinaya.
steps: Dooro 1-3 dabeecadood oo gaar ah: raacaya tilmaamaha, adeegsiga erayo aad ku codsato, ama gacmaha is-qabsiga.
Samee loox fudud oo leh 5 boos - mar kasta oo ilmuhu sameeyo dhaqanka, waxay helayaan calaamad.
Marka dhammaan 5ta calaamadood la kasbado, ilmuhu wuxuu ka dooranayaa abaal-marin liiska 3-4 ee hore loo dejiyay.
Ku bilow calaamado si sahlan loo heli karo (2-3 daqiiqo kasta) oo si tartiib tartiib ah ugu baahan dadaal dheeraad ah inta uu ilmuhu guulaysanayo.
sources: ABA Journey — Token Economy for Autism (abajourney.com/token-economy-autism/)
Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
Behavioral Innovations — ABA Strategies at Home (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/implement-aba-therapy-strategies-at-home/)

whyItMatters: Ilmo kasta oo autism-ka qaba wuxuu u baahan yahay meel loo qoondeeyay oo ay ku aadi karaan si ay u jajabiyaan xukun la'aan. Kani maaha meel ciqaabeed - waa qalab sharciyeed oo firfircoon. Haysashada meel ammaan ah oo la isku halayn karo waxay baraysaa carruurta inay gartaan markay u baahan yihiin nasasho iyo inay si madaxbannaan u qaataan, taas oo ah xirfad nololeed oo muhiim u ah maaraynta culayska badan.
steps: U qoondee meel yar oo xiran: gees leh teendho soo baxday, meel bannaan oo miiska hoostiisa ah oo bustayaal leh, ama armaajo barkimo leh.
Ku kaydi walxaha dejinaya: nalka jilicsan, sameecadaha dhegaha la gashado, fiidiyeyaasha, buste miisaan leh, buugaag aad jeceshahay.
Soo bandhig inta lagu jiro daqiiqad deggan: 'Tani waa meesha aad ku faraxsan tahay. Waxaad tagi kartaa halkan mar kasta oo aad u baahato nasasho.'
Waligaa ha u isticmaalin ciqaab ahaan hana u dirin ilmahaaga meeshaas iyaga oo aan raalli ka ahayn - waa inay xakameeyaan marka ay isticmaalayaan.
sources: Advanced Autism Services — Creating a Calm-Down Corner (advancedautism.com/post/creating-a-calm-down-corner-for-autism)
Autism Research Institute — Sensory-Friendly Strategies at Home (autism.org/sensory-friendly-strategies-at-home-p2/)

skill: Ciyaar qaabaysan: Sababta iyo Saamaynta Alaabta lagu ciyaaro
whyItMatters: Fahamka sababta iyo saamaynta - 'marka aan tan sameeyo, taasi waa dhacdaa' - waa xirfad garasho oo aasaasi ah oo hoosta ka xariiqaysa barashada, isgaarsiinta, iyo xalinta dhibaatada. Alaabada ay ku ciyaarto ee ka jawaaba ficilada (guji badhan, maqal dhawaaq, kabaal jiid, arag dhaqdhaqaaq) waxa ay ka dhigaan xidhiidhkan mid cad oo dhiirigelinaya. Tani inta badan waa barta laga bilaabo barista dhaqanka ula kac ah.
steps: Soo ururi 3-4 toy-iyo-saamayn ah oo ay ku ciyaaraan: toy pop-up, top spinal, qalab muusik, ama toy iftiin leh.
Qaabka ficilka si tartiib ah: riix batoonka, hakad, ka fal celi farxad marka ay shaqeyso.
U hag gacanta ilmahaaga si ay u dhaqaajiso toyga haddii loo baahdo, ka dibna si dhakhso ah u libdhi caawimadaada.
Ka sheekee sababta iyo saamaynta: 'Waxaad riixday badhanka! Muusigga ayaa ciyaaray!'
sources: Autism Little Learners — Functional Play and Autism (autismlittlelearners.com/functional-play-and-autism/)
ICDL — DIR/Floortime: Engaging and Relating (icdl.com/dir)
Autism Speaks — ESDM: Sensory Social Routines (autismspeaks.org/early-start-denver-model-esdm)

whyItMatters: Isku dhafka walxaha isku midka ah iyo kala soocida qaybaha waa xirfadaha garashada hore ee taageera horumarinta luqadda, u diyaarsanaanta xisaabta, iyo fikirka ururka. Carruur badan oo autism ah ayaa ah kala-soociyaal dabiici ah iyo kala-saarayaal - xooggan waxaa loo gudbin karaa waxbarasho habaysan. Isbarbardhigga waxa kale oo ay taageertaa takoorka aragga, kaas oo gacan ka geysta u diyaar-garowga akhriska.
steps: Ku bilow walxaha isku midka ah ee iswaafaqaya: laba koob oo cas, laba baloog oo buluug ah, laba sawir oo isku mid ah.
Horumarka is-waafajinta walxaha la midka ah laakiin aan isku midka ahayn: dhammaan koobabka oo dhan, dhammaan baloogyada oo dhan.
Ku bilow kala-soocidda hal sifo: u kala sooc midab, ka dibna cabbir, ka dibna qaab - midba mar.
Isticmaal waxa ilmahaagu xiiseeyo: u kala sooc baabuurta tareenada midab ahaan, ku dhig sawirada xayawaanka sawiradooda, ama u kala sooc cuntada nooc ahaan.
sources: Key Autism Services — Teaching Math to Students with Autism (keyautismservices.com/blog/teaching-math-to-students-with-autism)
Above and Beyond Therapy — TEACCH Method for Autism (abtaba.com/blog/teacch-method-for-autism)
Blue ABA Therapy — Discrete Trial Training (blueabatherapy.com/aba/discrete-trial-training-aba/)

whyItMatters: Ciyaarta iska yeelyeelku waa meel ay caruur badan oo autism ahi ay u baahan yihiin waxbarid cad. Ciyaarta khayaaliga ahi waxay dhistaa luqadda, fahamka bulshada, fikirka dabacsan, iyo habaynta shucuurta. Laga bilaabo ciyaar hawlkar ah oo fudud (isyeelyeelida inaad koob wax ka cabto) oo si tartiib tartiib ah u dhisto xaalado kakan (ciyaarta 'dukaanka') waxay xirfadahan ku horumarisaa qaab dabiici ah, oo xiiso leh.
steps: Ku bilow ciyaar hawlkar ah: sii ilmahaaga teleefan ay ku ciyaaraan oo model kula hadlaya, ama koob ciyaar oo iska dhig inuu cabbo.
U isticmaal danaha ilmahaaga mawduuca: haddii ay jecel yihiin tareenada, samee xarun tareen iska yeel leh oo leh tigidho iyo rakaab.
Moodel iska dhig ficilada adigoo garab socda cunugaaga adoon tilmaamin: quudi neefka cufan, sariir dhig, socod u qaado.
Mar ku dar hal shay oo cusub oo is yeel-yeel ah - ha ku daalin xaalad adag hal mar.
sources: ICDL — DIR/Floortime: Creating Emotional Ideas (icdl.com/dir/fedcs)
Wondirful Play — Six Stages of DIR/Floortime (wondirfulplay.com/blog/six-stages-of-dir-floortime-therapy)
Raising Children Network — DIR/Floortime Model (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/dir-floortime-model)

skill: Iyadoo la raacayo Jihooyin Labo Tallaabo ah
whyItMatters: Raacitaanka tilmaamo dhowr tallaabo ah ayaa muhiim u ah barashada fasalka, hawl maalmeedka, iyo badbaadada. Carruurta autistic-ka ah, tilmaamaha afka waxa laga yaabaa in si tartiib tartiib ah loo habeeyo ama la waayo iyada oo aan taageero muuqaal ah la helin. Ku celcelinta jihooyinka laba-tallaabo ee madadaalada, xaaladaha cadaadiska hooseeya waxay dhistaa xirfaddan si ay u diyaar noqoto marka ay ugu muhiimsan tahay.
steps: Bilow inta ciyaarta lagu jiro: 'Kubbada qaado oo ii keen' - isticmaal ereyga 'iyo' si aad u muujiso laba qaybood.
Isticmaal dhaqdhaqaaqyo barbar socda tilmaamaha afka ah: kubbadda u tilmaan, ka dibna naftada u tilmaan.
Ciyaar 'khasnada ugaadhsiga': bixi tilmaamo laba-tallaabo ah: 'Fiiri barkinta hoosteeda oo ii keen waxaad hesho.'
Marka aad ku guulaysato ficilada jireed, isku day laba-tallaabo hawlo garasho: ' Midabaynta goobada casaan iyo buluug labajibbaaran.'
sources: Blue ABA Therapy — Discrete Trial Training (blueabatherapy.com/aba/discrete-trial-training-aba/)
ASHA — Spoken Language Disorders: Following Directions (asha.org/practice-portal/clinical-topics/spoken-language-disorders/)

skill: Danaha Gaarka ah ee Buundada Waxbarasho ahaan
whyItMatters: Danaha gaarka ah ee aadka u daran waa astaan ​​lagu garto autism-ka waana in la qaataa, ee aan la niyad jabin. Danahani waxay bixiyaan dhiirigelin dabiici ah oo loo marin karo barashada xirfad kasta. Ilmaha jecel tareenada wuxuu ku baran karaa tirinta, akhrinta, xirfadaha bulshada, iyo juqraafiga isagoo isticmaalaya tareeno. Cilmi-baaristu waxay muujinaysaa in ka faa'iidaysiga danaha gaarka ah ay si weyn u wanaajiso ka-qaybgalka iyo natiijooyinka.
steps: Aqoonso xiisaha aadka u daran ee ilmahaaga hadda - waxay noqon kartaa tareeno, dinosaurs, lambaro, xarfo, bandhig gaar ah, ama khibrad dareen.
Ku xidh yoolalka tacliinta ama bulsheed ee xiisaha: tiri dinosaurs, akhri buugaag ku saabsan tareenada, ku beddel toy aad jeceshahay.
U isticmaal xiisaha abaal-marin ahaan: 'Ka dib markaan ku celcelino qorista, waxaad ku ciyaari kartaa tareenadaada 10 daqiiqo.'
Xushmee xiisaha - waligaa ha u qaadin ciqaab ahaan. Waa isha farxadda iyo nidaamka ubadkaaga.
sources: Chicago ABA Therapy — PRT: Following Child's Lead (chicagoabatherapy.com/resources/articles/dtt-difference-prt/)
Autism Speaks — Autism and Your Child's Special Interests (autismspeaks.org)
PMC — Affirming Neurodiversity Within ABA (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11219658/)

skill: Waxbarid Tijaabo ah oo Caqli ah: 5-Daqiiqo Xirfado Qarsoon
whyItMatters: Tababbarka Tijaabada Discrete (DTT) waa farsamo habaysan oo ABA ah oo u kala jebisa waxbarashada si cad, tijaabooyin soo noqnoqda: bixi tilmaan, degdeg haddii loo baahdo, sug jawaab, abaal marin jawaabta saxda ah. 5-daqiiqo gaaban ee 'xirfada dilaacsan' guriga waxay dardargelin kartaa waxbarashada meelaha sida calaamadinta, isbarbardhigga, iyo raacitaanka tilmaamaha iyada oo aan loo baahnayn daaweeyaha inuu joogo.
steps: Dooro hal bartilmaameed oo fudud: magacaabista midabada, garashada xubnaha jirka, ama sawirada isbarbardhiga.
Soo bandhig tilmaamo cad: 'Taabo kan cas' oo wata 2-3 shay.
Sug 3-5 ilbiriqsi jawaabta Haddii ay sax tahay, bixi ammaan gaar ah oo degdeg ah iyo abaalmarin yar. Haddii aysan sax ahayn, si tartiib ah u soo sheeg oo isku day mar kale.
Samee 5-10 tijaabo oo isku xigta, ka dibna ku naso hawl aad door bidayso. Ka dhig fadhiyada gaaban oo wanaagsan.
sources: Blue ABA Therapy — Discrete Trial Training Guide (blueabatherapy.com/aba/discrete-trial-training-aba/)
Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
PMC — Scoping Review: ABA Evidence Base (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9458805/)

whyItMatters: Bar carruurta si ay u xalliyaan dhibaatooyinka si madax-bannaan waxay dhistaa adkeysi waxayna yareysaa ku-tiirsanaanta dadka waaweyn. Carruurta autistic-ka ah, u jebinta mushkiladaha xalinta aragga, tillaabooyin la taaban karo ayaa ka dhigaya xirfaddan mid la heli karo. Ujeedadu maaha in la baabi'iyo dhibaatooyinka laakiin waa in carruurta la siiyo hannaan la isku halayn karo oo ay wax kaga qabanayaan.
steps: Samee loox fudud oo mushkilad xaliya muuqaal: 1) waa maxay dhibaatadu? 2) Maxaan isku dayi karaa? 3) Isku day. 4) Ma shaqaynaysay?
Qaabka loo isticmaalo looxa dhibaatooyinka dhabta ah: 'Ma gaari karo koobka. Maxaan isku dayi karaa? Waxaan isticmaali karaa saxaro!'
Marka ilmahaagu la kulmo dhibaato, ku hag guddiga intii aad u xallin lahayd iyaga.
Bixi laba xal oo suurtagal ah oo aad marka hore ka dooran karto, ka dibna si tartiib ah ugu dhiirigeli abuurista fikradahooda.
sources: TEACCH — Structured Teaching and Problem Solving (teacch.com)
Raising Children Network — Visual Supports (raisingchildren.net.au/autism/therapies-guide/visual-supports)
Above and Beyond Therapy — TEACCH Method (abtaba.com/blog/teacch-method-for-autism)

whyItMatters: Bar carruurta inay codsadaan nasasho ka hor intaanay gaadhin xadka waa mid ka mid ah xirfadaha isu-dooda ee ugu awoodda badan. Waxay ka hortagtaa dhalaalka, yaraynaysaa dabeecadaha adag, waxayna siisaa carruurta hab bulsho ahaan ku habboon oo ay u maareeyaan culeyska xad dhaafka ah. Ilmaha odhan kara, saxeexi kara, ama tusi kara kaadhka 'nasasho' waxa uu samaynayaa istiraatijiyad is-xakamaynta nolosha oo dhan.
steps: Samee kaadhka 'nasasho' oo leh muuqaal cad oo u dhig mid la heli karo mar walba - miiska dushiisa, barxadda, ama sabuuradda isgaarsiinta.
Bar codsiga marka lagu jiro xaaladaha walaaca yar marka hore: 'Marka aad u baahan tahay nasasho, i tus kaarkan.'
Maamuuso codsi kasta oo jabin isla markiiba marka hore - dhisida kalsoonida in nidaamku shaqeeyo ayaa ka muhiimsan dhamaystirka hawsha.
Tartiib tartiib qaab dhismeedka ayaa burbura: 'Shaqo weyn oo codsanaya nasasho! Aynu qaadano 2 daqiiqo, ka dib waan dhamayn doonaa.
sources: Autism Speaks — Challenging Behaviors Tool Kit (autismspeaks.org/tool-kit/challenging-behaviors-tool-kit)
How to ABA — Emotional Regulation in Autism (howtoaba.com/emotional-regulation-in-autism/)
PMC — Affirming Neurodiversity Within ABA (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11219658/)

whyItMatters: Kartida lagu waydiisan karo caawimo waa xirfad nololeed oo muhiim ah oo caruur badan oo autism ahi ay u baahan yihiin waxbarid cad si ay u koraan. Xirfaddan la'aanteed, carruurta waxaa laga yaabaa inay niyad jabaan oo ay ficil sameeyaan, ama si fudud uga tanaasulaan hawlaha. Barida 'waxaan u baahanahay caawimo' sida fal isgaarsiineed - hadday tahay hadalka, calaamada, badhanka, ama kaarka - waxay awood u siisaa carruurta inay ka qaybqaataan waxqabadyo ka baxsan heerkooda madaxbannaanida.
steps: Dooro hal dariiqo oo ilmahaagu u codsan karo caawimo: isagoo leh 'caawin', saxeexa 'caawin', riixaya badhan, ama ku siinaya kaar.
Samee xaalado caawimo looga baahan yahay: ku rid toy aad jeceshahay weel xiran, ama sii halxiraalaha hal gabal oo qarsoon.
Qaabil codsiga: 'Tani waa adag tahay! Waxaan u baahanahay caawimaad!' dabadeed isla markiiba u bixi caawimo si ay u arkaan xidhiidhka.
Si degdeg ah oo qumman uga jawaab codsiyada caawinta mar kasta - xawaaraha iyo joogteynta ayaa dhisa caadada.
sources: Autism Speaks — Applied Behavior Analysis: Communication (autismspeaks.org/applied-behavior-analysis)
PECS USA — Picture Exchange Communication System (pecsusa.com/pecs/)
Behavioral Innovations — ABA Strategies at Home (behavioral-innovations.com/blog/implement-aba-therapy-strategies-at-home/)

whyItMatters: Bar ilmaha inuu si ku habboon u yiraahdo 'maya' waxay lama huraan u tahay badbaadada iyo ixtiraamka naftiisa. Hababka daawaynta badan ayaa taariikh ahaan diiradda saaraya u hoggaansanaanta, laakiin dhaqanka casriga ah ee kala duwanaanshaha-neerfaha ayaa aqoonsanaya in ilmaha diidi kara uu yahay ilmo is ilaalin kara. Barida diidmada ku habboon waxay ka hortagtaa kororka dhibka taasoo keenta dhalaalid.
steps: Bar hab cad oo aad ku diidi karto: 'Maya mahadsanid', ruxmada madaxa, dhaqdhaqaaq gacan 'joojin', ama kaarka 'maya'.
Abuur fursado ku celcelinta inta lagu jiro xaaladaha hooseeyo: bixi cunto aan la door bidin oo aqbal 'maya' si xarrago leh.
Kala saar kuwa aan gorgortanka ahayn (badbaadada) iyo kuwa gorgortanka ka geli kara (doorbidyada) - u oggolow 'maya' dookhyada.
Marka ilmahaagu si habboon u yidhaahdo 'maya', ixtiraam oo ammaan xidhiidhka: 'Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad ii sheegtay!'
sources: PMC — Affirming Neurodiversity Within ABA (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11219658/)
Child Mind Institute — ABA Controversy (childmind.org/article/controversy-around-applied-behavior-analysis/)
Autism Speaks — Self-Advocacy (autismspeaks.org)

whyItMatters: Marka ay carruurtu koraan, fahamka autism-kooda ayaa muhiim u ah is-aqoonsiga, isu doodidda, iyo helitaanka taageerada. Wadaagista ogaanshaha si togan, oo ku salaysan xoogga ayaa ka caawisa carruurta inay u arkaan autism-ka qayb ka mid ah cidda ay yihiin - maaha wax iyaga ka khaldan. Carruurta fahamsan cilad-sheegiddooda waxay leeyihiin natiijooyin wanaagsan oo caafimaadka dhimirka ah iyo xirfado isu-dooda oo xooggan.
steps: Isticmaal luqadda da'da ku habboon: 'Maskaxdaadu si kala duwan ayay u shaqeysaa - waxaad arkaysaa waxyaabo ay dadka kale tabayaan, waxyaabaha qaarna waxay kugu dareemayaan wax weyn.'
Si wada jir ah u akhri buugaag ku saabsan autismka: 'Gabadha Sawirada ka fikirtay', 'Dhammaan Bisadaha waxay ku sugan yihiin Autism Spectrum', ama magacyo la mid ah.
Xooga saar marka hore: xusuusta cajiibka ah, xiisaha qoto dheer, fiiro gaar ah u leh faahfaahinta, daacadnimada, aragti gaar ah.
U ogolow ilmahaagu inuu go'aansado cidda uu u sheegayo iyo goorta - tani waa macluumaadkooda si ay ula wadaagaan shuruudahooda.
sources: Autism Speaks — Autism Diagnosis Criteria: DSM-5 (autismspeaks.org/autism-diagnosis-criteria-dsm-5)
PMC — Affirming Neurodiversity Within ABA (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11219658/)
ASAN — Autistic Self Advocacy Network: Identity-First Language (autisticadvocacy.org)
